summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 26 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 89 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 39 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 16 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 37 days past due with 26 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,320 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 25 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 16. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **23 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,594 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $46,080 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

243 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **124 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 38 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$79,874 in payments going out this week** across 45 tasks — make sure funds are available. $15,531 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 11. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 10 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **24 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 53 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 6 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 52 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 6. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 26 overdue (oldest: 37d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 2 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 16 overdue — oldest first. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **23 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 30 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **24 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 34 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
